title: roldana quezaltica
intro: Roldana quezaltica, also known as Mexican mountain mint, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its aromatic leaves and purple flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Roldana quezaltica include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Roldana quezaltica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation.
